title: stipa purpurea subsp. arenosa
intro: Stipa purpurea subsp. arenosa, also known as Purple Needle Grass or Mountain Brome, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Stipa purpurea subsp. arenosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Stipa purpurea subsp. arenosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
